description: Style NoteCut from soft and stretchy knit cotton fabric, this fashion brief from chromozome epitomises style and comfort. Its elasticated wide waistband offers a snug Fit while printed branding on the inside provides tag-less comfort. Available to you at a price that does not burn a hole in your pocket this piece makes for a great buy.Product DetailsInk blue brief, green panels at side, wide elasticized waistband with branding for a smooth and comfortable grip, double layered front for extra support and comfort, high cut design allows free leg movement, printed branding on the inside offers abrasion-free comfortMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not iron on printSize and FitRegular riseThe model (height 6' and waist 32'') is wearing a size M The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.
